div.h1: Memory Layout: Log Entry Binary Format

div.p: Total = 8 (offset) + 8 (timestamp) + 2 (topicLen) + N (topic) + 4 (payloadLen) + M (payload) + 4 (CRC32) Total = 26 + N + M bytes Minimum = 26 bytes (empty topic + empty payload) Maximum = 26 + 256 + 10,485,760 bytes ≈ 10 MB

ul.li: Endianness: All multi-byte integers are big-endian (network byte order)
CRC32: IEEE polynomial, calculated over bytes 0 through 22+N+M-1 (all bytes except CRC field)
Alignment: No padding; fields are packed consecutively
Validation: Decode verifies CRC before returning; ErrCRCMismatch on corruption
Offset: Monotonically increasing, globally unique across all topics

div.p: Offset: 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 01 (1) Timestamp: 18 F2 C8 A3 5B 00 00 00 (1709635200000000000) TopicLen: 00 06 (6) Topic: 6F 72 64 65 72 73 ("orders") PayloadLen: 00 00 00 05 (5) Payload: 68 65 6C 6C 6F ("hello") CRC32: A3 5B 7C 9D (checksum) Total size: 8 + 8 + 2 + 6 + 4 + 5 + 4 = 37 bytes
